variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16513 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16513 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16513 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 192.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 146.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 110.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 379.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 377.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 22.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P628327 Air Filter, Primary Radialseal | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16513
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P628327 Air Filter, Primary Radialseal | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16513
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Replacement Filters? Replacement filters for Fleetguard Optiair Air Cleaners deliver superior performance and proven protection. • High-efficiency cellulose media is a proven performer across a wide range of heavy-duty diesel engine applications. • Unique sawtooth design compresses to cushion and hold the filter in place, providing a secure seal – even in severe environments. • RadialSeal™ design allows for fast filter changes. • Durable structural support protects filters from damage or collapse in heavy vibration applications or humid conditions.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF26120 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16513
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF26120 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16513
variants.description: Fleetguard® OptiAir™ AF26120 primary air element addresses key design requirements of all equipment manufacturers while outperforming conventional radial seal designs. Resulting in extended service intervals, reduced downtime, and lower maintenance costs.
